{{Expand}}

{{Infobox icon
| name = Lemon's insignia
| introduced = The Pilot
}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Lemon]] wears a golden 'L' on her suit.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c30">''The Pilot'', chapter 30</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Icons]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
